projects.title: Jarvis - Virtual Assistant
projects.description: A voice-controlled virtual assistant developed using Python with speech recognition and automation capabilities.
projects.longDescription: Developed a virtual assistant named Jarvis during Class 12 using Python and various libraries. Implemented voice command recognition and automation features. The assistant can perform tasks like opening applications, searching the web, telling time, and other helpful functions through natural voice commands.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern portfolio website with glassmorphism UI, dark/light mode, and smooth animations.
projects.longDescription: Built a beautiful, responsive portfolio website using React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. Features include glassmorphism design, particle backgrounds, Framer Motion animations, dark/light theme toggle, and 10+ pages including Home, About, Skills, Projects, Experience, Certifications, Resume, Blog, Gallery, and Contact.

projects.title: Java Banking System
projects.description: Console-based banking system demonstrating OOP concepts and file handling in Java.
projects.longDescription: A complete banking system in Java demonstrating OOP principles including inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation. Features account management, transactions, and persistent file storage.
